title: oreogrammitis forbesiana
intro: Oreogrammitis forbesiana, also known as the Indian fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Oreogrammitis forbesiana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal benefits.
